groups.delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the group {name} ({slug})?
groups.delete.listings_note: Listings in this group will not be deleted — they will be moved out of the group.

groups.fields.name: Group Name
groups.fields.max_attendees_hint: Limits total attendees across all listings in this group. Leave blank for no limit. Works best when all listings in the group are the same type (daily or standard).
groups.fields.terms_hint: If set, overrides the global terms and conditions for this group ticket page
